title: onychium japonicum var. lucidum
intro: Onychium japonicum var. lucidum, also known as Japanese onychium or lucid fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
